differential_diagnoses: Dengue hemorrhagic fever with pulmonary complications
next_steps: Perform bronchoalveolar lavage for cytology, fungal stains/culture, and galactomannan
Measure serum procalcitonin and repeat blood cultures
Obtain extensive autoimmune panel (ANCA, anti-GBM, ANA)
Consider echocardiography to rule out occult endocarditis given dental history
